topic: ACL main evidence registry stack-entry terminology polish

review_scope.figure_regeneration_command:
python - <<'PY'
from paper.shared.figures.gen_supplement_task_media_atlases import build_evidence_gate_registry_companion
build_evidence_gate_registry_companion()
PY

before_text_matches: page 6 line 016: Embodied-data      Official KuJiaLe InternNav 99
page 6 line 017: sanity             paired episodes over three
defect.reader_effect: The table and companion card retained sanity terminology while the main text scoped the same evidence as a stack-entry check.

changes.summary: Changed the embodied gate label from Embodied-data sanity to Stack entry.
Changed the evidence-gate registry companion card title from Embodied sanity to Stack entry.
Regenerated the companion PNG with the Stack entry card title.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Page 6 extracted text now shows Stack entry and no Embodied-data sanity in the table.
after_evidence.visual_result: The accepted page-6 screenshot shows Stack entry in both the table row and the companion card.

claim_boundary: Visible terminology only for Table 1 and the companion card. No metrics, evidence pools, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: Other supplement-only coordinate baseline materials still use sanity terminology for deterministic scorer checks; this round only addresses the main-paper embodied-stack gate.
